NPPs who are allowed to perform the encounter are: 
 • A nurse practitioner or a clinical nurse specialist working in accordance with State 
law and in collaboration with the certifying physician or in collaboration with an 
acute or post-acute care physician, with privileges, who cared for the patient in 
the acute or post-acute care facility from which the patient was directly admitted 
to home health;
